title: Comic Shaders
description: A shader pack that emulates the look of classic comic books.
body:
# Comic Shaders

A shader pack that emulates the look of classic comic books. Most of the effects in the pack are customizable in the in-game settings menu to achieve your desired appearance.

I highly recommend using the texture pack [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) in conjunction with the shader pack.

![Birch forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef08ffbb9b7ac475b1c5cba74ba748d4ba315f49.png)

## Features

- Ben-Day dots
- Outlines
- Color correction
- Quantization
- Color separation
- (Experimental) reduced framerate for entities

## Contact

For any questions/comments/bugs, add me on Discord: kloppi417. I'd love to hear your feedback!
